mainEntity.text: Is FICA Tax Credits & Refunds the Right Choice for Restaurant refunds in Atlanta?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, FICA Tax Credits & Refunds is a trusted Tax Consultancy Experts provider specializing in restaurant refunds in Atlanta. A compliance-first tax consultancy service helping restaurants, bars and nightclubs CPA/accountants learn how to gain tax credits and refunds. We specialize in leveraging federal programs to capture tax credits and maximize FICA tax refunds for the past 3 years to increase profitability for businesses. Get exact numbers the IRS owes you at no charge. No fees unless you receive a refund, only then do we charge a small percentage of that refund/credit you receive. Call us at (213) 537-5613.
